elevenlabs/eleven_v3.description: Latest flagship text-to-speech model. Produces natural, life-like speech with high emotional range and contextual understanding across 70+ languages.
elevenlabs/eleven_v3.notes: Supports Text to Speech and Text to Voice (Voice Design) use cases.

elevenlabs/eleven_multilingual_v2.description: Most lifelike, emotionally rich speech synthesis model supporting 29 languages.
elevenlabs/eleven_multilingual_v2.notes: Supports TTS, Text to Voice (Voice Design), and Speech to Speech (Voice Changer).

elevenlabs/eleven_flash_v2_5.description: Ultra-fast model optimized for real-time use (~75ms latency). Supports all Multilingual v2 languages plus Hungarian, Norwegian, and Vietnamese.
elevenlabs/eleven_flash_v2_5.notes: Recommended over legacy Turbo models for all use cases.

elevenlabs/eleven_flash_v2.description: Ultra-fast model optimized for real-time use (~75ms latency). English-only.
elevenlabs/eleven_flash_v2.notes: English-only. Recommended over legacy Turbo models.

elevenlabs/scribe_v2.description: State-of-the-art speech recognition model for accurate transcription across 90+ languages. Provides precise word-level timestamps, speaker diarization, and dynamic audio tagging.

elevenlabs/scribe_v2_realtime.description: Accurate low-latency Speech to Text model delivering live transcription in under 150ms.

elevenlabs/music_v2.description: Studio-grade music generation from text prompts, composition plans, and previously generated songs.
elevenlabs/music_v2.notes: Supports chunk-based composition plans for finer control over structure and arrangement.

elevenlabs/eleven_text_to_sound_v2.description: Sound effects generation from text prompts.

text-to-speech.description: Generate natural, lifelike speech from text.

speech-to-text.description: Transcribe audio with high accuracy across 90+ languages.

voice-cloning.description: Clone voices from short audio samples (Instant Voice Cloning).

professional-voice-cloning.description: High-fidelity voice cloning with advanced controls (available on Creator and above).

voice-library.description: Access to a library of pre-made voices.

voice-design.description: Create custom voices from text descriptions.

dubbing.description: Automatically dub audio and video content.

reader.description: Mobile app for listening to text content.

sound-effects.description: Generate sound effects from text prompts.

agents.description: Build conversational AI agents with voice.

api.description: Programmatic access to all ElevenLabs models.

webhooks.description: Real-time event notifications for API actions.

workspaces.description: Team collaboration and shared credits (Scale and above).

plans.notes: 10,000 credits/month. Non-commercial use only with attribution. 3 custom voice slots. No instant voice cloning.
30,000 credits/month. Commercial license included. Instant voice cloning. 20 Studio projects.
100,000 credits/month. 192kbps audio quality. Professional Voice Cloning. First month 50% off ($11). Overage ~$0.30/min (TTS) and ~$0.22/min (STT).
500,000 credits/month. 44.1kHz PCM audio output via API. Overage TTS: $0.24/min; STT: $0.17/min.
2,000,000 credits/month. 3 workspace seats. Team collaboration. Overage TTS: $0.18/min; STT: $0.12/min.
11,000,000 credits/month. 5 seats. 3 Professional Voice Clones. TTS starting at $0.05/min (volume discounted), STT starting at $0.04/min. Overage rates vary.
Custom enterprise pricing. Custom credits and seats. HIPAA BAAs, custom SSO, DPA, SLA terms. Elevated concurrency limits. ElevenStudios fully managed dubbing. Volume discounts.

models.notes: Text to Speech pricing: starting at $0.05 per 1,000 characters (Creator plan). Billed in characters, not tokens.
Speech to Text pricing: starting at $0.22 per minute of audio (Starter plan). Billed by audio duration, not tokens.

textToSpeech.description: Pricing varies by plan and model. Flash model under Creator plan: $0.05/1K characters (reduced from $0.11, 55% savings).

speechToText.description: Scribe v2 under Starter plan: $0.22/min (reduced from $0.40, 45% savings).

payAsYouGo.description: Prepay for usage with or without a paid subscription. Scale from prototype to production without plan constraints.

apiPricing.notes: Annual billing provides approximately two months free compared to monthly billing. Overage rates vary by plan: Creator ~$0.30/min (TTS) / $0.22/min (STT), Pro ~$0.24/min / $0.17/min, Scale ~$0.18/min / $0.12/min, Business volume discounted. Enterprise pricing is custom.

notes: ElevenLabs operates on a credit-based system. Credits are consumed across all products (TTS, STT, dubbing, music, etc.). The scribe_v1, eleven_monolingual_v1, and eleven_multilingual_v1 models are deprecated and will be removed on July 9, 2026. The eleven_turbo_v2_5 and eleven_turbo_v2 models are functionally equivalent to Flash models; Flash models are recommended.
